languages.text: "Среди экспонатов этой галереи есть объект с совпадающим именованием. Он расположен сразу за исторической диорамой в центральной части зала, посвященной примитиву, некогда совершившему кражу объекта". {n}Многогранники, парящие над головой хрономанта, мерцают и вращаются в такт его размеренной речи.{/n}

"There is an object by that name among the exhibits in this gallery. It is located just beyond the historical diorama in the centre of the room, the one dedicated to the primitive who once stole that same object." {n}The polyhedrons hovering above the Chronomancer's head shimmer and rotate to the rhythm of his measured speech.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Среди экспонатов этой галереи есть объект с совпадающим именованием. Он расположен сразу за исторической диорамой в центральной части зала, посвященной примитиву, некогда совершившему кражу объекта". {n}Многогранники, парящие над головой хрономанта, мерцают и вращаются в такт его размеренной речи.{/n}

languages.text: “这间展厅里确实有一件叫这名字的展品，它就在房间中央那座历史实景模型的后面。那座模型正是为了纪念曾偷走这件展品的原始生物。”{n}悬在编时匠头顶的多面体随着他平稳规律的语调不断闪烁、旋转。{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is an object by that name among the exhibits in this gallery. It is located just beyond the historical diorama in the centre of the room, the one dedicated to the primitive who once stole that same object." {n}The polyhedrons hovering above the Chronomancer's head shimmer and rotate to the rhythm of his measured speech.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这间展厅里确实有一件叫这名字的展品，它就在房间中央那座历史实景模型的后面。那座模型正是为了纪念曾偷走这件展品的原始生物。”{n}悬在编时匠头顶的多面体随着他平稳规律的语调不断闪烁、旋转。{/n}

languages.text: «Hay un objeto con ese nombre entre las exposiciones de esta galería. Está pasando el diorama histórico del centro de la sala, dedicado al ser primitivo que robó dicho objeto en su día». {n}Los poliedros que flotan por encima de la cabeza del cronomante brillan y giran al ritmo de sus palabras.{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is an object by that name among the exhibits in this gallery. It is located just beyond the historical diorama in the centre of the room, the one dedicated to the primitive who once stole that same object." {n}The polyhedrons hovering above the Chronomancer's head shimmer and rotate to the rhythm of his measured speech.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Hay un objeto con ese nombre entre las exposiciones de esta galería. Está pasando el diorama histórico del centro de la sala, dedicado al ser primitivo que robó dicho objeto en su día». {n}Los poliedros que flotan por encima de la cabeza del cronomante brillan y giran al ritmo de sus palabras.{/n}

languages.text: « Il existe un objet de ce nom parmi les pièces de cette galerie. Il se trouve juste derrière le diorama historique au centre de la pièce, celui-là même qui représente la créature primitive venue autrefois dérober ce même objet. » {n}Les polyèdres planant au-dessus de la tête du chronomancien se mettent à briller et à tournoyer au rythme régulier de son élocution.{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is an object by that name among the exhibits in this gallery. It is located just beyond the historical diorama in the centre of the room, the one dedicated to the primitive who once stole that same object." {n}The polyhedrons hovering above the Chronomancer's head shimmer and rotate to the rhythm of his measured speech.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Il existe un objet de ce nom parmi les pièces de cette galerie. Il se trouve juste derrière le diorama historique au centre de la pièce, celui-là même qui représente la créature primitive venue autrefois dérober ce même objet. » {n}Les polyèdres planant au-dessus de la tête du chronomancien se mettent à briller et à tournoyer au rythme régulier de son élocution.{/n}

languages.text: "Bu galerideki sergiler arasında bu isme sahip bir nesne var. Odanın ortasında olan, bir zamanlar aynı nesneyi çalan ilkele adanmış tarihî diyoramanın hemen ötesinde yer alıyor." {n}Kronobaz'ın başının üzerinde asılı duran çok yüzlüler, onun ölçülü konuşmasının ritmiyle parlayıp dönüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is an object by that name among the exhibits in this gallery. It is located just beyond the historical diorama in the centre of the room, the one dedicated to the primitive who once stole that same object." {n}The polyhedrons hovering above the Chronomancer's head shimmer and rotate to the rhythm of his measured speech.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bu galerideki sergiler arasında bu isme sahip bir nesne var. Odanın ortasında olan, bir zamanlar aynı nesneyi çalan ilkele adanmış tarihî diyoramanın hemen ötesinde yer alıyor." {n}Kronobaz'ın başının üzerinde asılı duran çok yüzlüler, onun ölçülü konuşmasının ritmiyle parlayıp dönüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Unter den Exponaten dieser Galerie gibt es ein Objekt dieses Namens. Es befindet sich gleich hinter dem historischen Diorama in der Mitte des Raums, das dem primitiven Wesen gewidmet ist, das ebendieses Objekt einst stahl." {n}Die über dem Kopf des Chronomanten schwebenden Polyeder schimmern und drehen sich im Rhythmus seiner wohlüberlegten Worte.{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is an object by that name among the exhibits in this gallery. It is located just beyond the historical diorama in the centre of the room, the one dedicated to the primitive who once stole that same object." {n}The polyhedrons hovering above the Chronomancer's head shimmer and rotate to the rhythm of his measured speech.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Unter den Exponaten dieser Galerie gibt es ein Objekt dieses Namens. Es befindet sich gleich hinter dem historischen Diorama in der Mitte des Raums, das dem primitiven Wesen gewidmet ist, das ebendieses Objekt einst stahl." {n}Die über dem Kopf des Chronomanten schwebenden Polyeder schimmern und drehen sich im Rhythmus seiner wohlüberlegten Worte.{/n}

languages.text: 「このギャラリーの展示物の中に、その名前のついた物体があります。それは、この部屋の中央にある歴史のジオラマのすぐ先にある、かつてその同じ物を盗んだ原始人に捧げられたものです。」{n}時空間の魔術師の頭上を漂う多面体は、彼の落ち着いた話し方に合わせて輝き、回転する。{/n}
languages.original_text: "There is an object by that name among the exhibits in this gallery. It is located just beyond the historical diorama in the centre of the room, the one dedicated to the primitive who once stole that same object." {n}The polyhedrons hovering above the Chronomancer's head shimmer and rotate to the rhythm of his measured speech.{/n}
